positive: A whimsical, hand-drawn illustration of a group of forest animals (fox, deer, owl) having a picnic in a bioluminescent meadow. Style: Studio Ghibli inspired, vibrant watercolor, highly detailed, soft lighting, ethereal atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, oversaturated
